description: FIRST_TIME_CONTRIBUTOR @mentions the bot. Their `author_association` is NOT in the default allowlist, so onComment returns null and no turn is dispatched.

issue.title: [Bug] callGitHub does not retry on 502
issue.body:
## Steps to reproduce

1. Set `GITHUB_APP_ID` to a valid ID.
2. Call `callGitHub(ctx, "GET", "/repos/foo/bar\`) against a repo whose App installation returns 502.
3. Observe: the call throws `GitHubApiError` immediately rather than retrying.

## Expected behavior

The call should retry on transient 5xx up to 3 times with exponential backoff.

## Environment

- agent/agent.ts
- Node 24
- Windows 11 / pnpm 9

comment.body: @eve-triage can you take a look at this?

expected.rationale: FIRST_TIME_CONTRIBUTOR is outside the default allowlist. The dispatcher returns null and no turn starts — drive-by contributors cannot wake the bot.
